rows.label: qev095101_MSG0001
rows.name: I have a top-secret mission for you, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Commander Vandham even
asked for you by name.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_JNK0010
rows.name: Ask about Mission

rows.label: qev095101_SEL0011
rows.name: Press Stella for a detailed briefing.

rows.label: qev095101_JNK0020
rows.name: Ask about Stella

rows.label: qev095101_SEL0021
rows.name: Inquire as to what Stella's job is.

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Zero hesitation. You
BLADEs don't mess around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0004
rows.name: I'll get right to it, then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'd rather not say too much, but
I'm a member of an... intelligence
agency, let's call it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0006
rows.name:
I serve as a courier of sorts, delivering sensitive
missions from the commander or director general
to the individuals they're intended for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0007
rows.name:
Just think of me as your friendly
neighborhood message girl.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0008
rows.name:
You expanded FrontierNet into
Valley of Oblivion, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Well, that's given us access
to new Growth intel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Perhaps you're familiar with the Bias
village in southern Valley of Oblivion?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0011
rows.name:
We've learned there are xenoforms in that
village being held as forced laborers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0012
rows.name:
They are neither human nor Nopon—it's
an entirely new alien race.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0013
rows.name:
If we can free them and win them
over to our side, we stand to gain
a mountain of intel on the Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0014
rows.name:
There's even a strong chance
they might join us as allies
like the Ma-non and Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0015
rows.name:
You can see how this opportunity
is too tasty for us to pass up.
So, how about it then?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0016
rows.name:
Excellent. The commander
said you'd say that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0017
rows.name:
Judging from our maps, this is a
pretty large Bias settlement, so
expect some heavy resistance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0018
rows.name:
But there are a number of viable
infiltration routes. As long as you
stay cool out there, you should be fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0019
rows.name: Best of luck.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Those unidentified xenoforms are
being held at Dryland Cave Fortress
in southern Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0021
rows.name:
Your job is to liberate
them, whatever the cost.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0022
rows.name: Wh-what? Bias in the city?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0023
rows.name:
Dammit! How did they break
through our defenses?! We
need the Avalanche here NOW![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_JNK0030
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev095101_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell Stella that these Bias are not hostile.

rows.label: qev095101_JNK0040
rows.name: Soothe

rows.label: qev095101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Stella to assess the situation calmly.

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0024
rows.name:
...Two different tribes under Growth
rule? Really? I had no idea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Just that alone is an incredibly valuable
piece of intel. Excellent work, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0026
rows.name:
But they're PRONE! We can't
let bloodthirsty animals like
that just waltz in here and—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Enough, Stella. These
Bias are not aggressive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0028
rows.name: We are Tree Clan. We fight Cavern Clan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0029
rows.name:
So there are two different tribes
under Growth rule? I had no idea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Just that alone is an incredibly valuable
piece of intel. Excellent work, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0031
rows.name:
So the tribes are called
Cavern Clan and Tree Clan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0032
rows.name:
It seems the landscape within
the Growth camp is more complex
than we'd imagined.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0033
rows.name:
Director General, forgive me for
putting this so indelicately, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0034
rows.name:
I believe these Tree Clan members
could be of considerable use to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0035
rows.name:
Agreed. I will authorize
their residence in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0036
rows.name:
I'll also inform Defense Secretary
Nagi and the others, and take care
of the necessary paperwork.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0037
rows.name:
I give thanks to Great
Tree. And to Earth aliens![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0038
rows.name:
In exchange, perhaps you will agree to
share what you know of the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0039
rows.name:
Does it win Tree Clan
freedom? Then I will help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0040
rows.name:
You have my thanks. Stella, will you
assist them in their transition, please?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0041
rows.name: Of course, sir.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0042
rows.name:
My name is Stella. If there is
anything you need, please don't
hesitate to mention it, Mr...um...Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0043
rows.name:
I am Sevvy Belgazus. Proud
leader of Tree Clan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev095101_MSG0044
rows.name: Well, welcome to NLA, Sevvy Belgazus![ST:wait ]
